settings.delivery_text: Dispatched in 1–2 days · Delivered in about 4–7 working days · Free UK delivery over £35

settings.q: Do lick mats and snuffle mats actually help with anxiety?
settings.a: They give dogs a repetitive, nose-led job to focus on. Licking and sniffing are natural self-soothing behaviours, so many owners use them around fireworks, storms and settling a new rescue. They're comfort and enrichment tools, not medical treatments.

settings.q: How much is delivery and how long does it take?
settings.a: Free UK delivery on orders over £35. Under that, the cost is shown in full at checkout — never a surprise. Most of our range is dispatched within 1–2 days and arrives in about 4–7 working days. The Car Boot Liner is stocked in our UK warehouse, so it dispatches same-day and arrives in 2–5 working days.
